title: taraxia subacaulis
intro: Taraxia subacaulis is a type of plant that belongs to the family Nyctaginaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxia subacaulis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Taraxia subacaulis include decoctions and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
